title: Template V2 Layer
description: A composable scene-intelligence unit. One layer = one directorial decision (how the env looks, how the camera is placed, how the hero moves, etc.). Layers are pure data; the executor translates them into scene_plan fields that the existing V1.1 preset system consumes.

name.description: Unique layer id within its kind. Must match the filename stem.

kind.description: Which slot this layer fills in a recipe.

version.description: Schema version of THIS layer file. Bumped on breaking changes.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this layer expresses cinematically.

inputs_required.description: Context keys this layer needs to run. Executor fails loudly if missing.

outputs_produced.description: Context keys this layer guarantees to set when it succeeds.

applies.description: Kind-specific payload. See per-kind sub-schemas. The executor dispatches on `kind`.

metadata.description: Non-semantic author notes (quality, provenance, references, etc.).

renderer_support.description: Which renderer backends have an implementation for this layer.
